title: UK overseas trade in goods statistics October 2025: import and export data
body: "The following tables contain EU and non-EU import and export data for October 2025 at chapter level.                UK overseas trade in goods statistics October 2025: imports    ODS, 27 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format                    UK overseas trade in goods statistics October 2025: exports    ODS, 26.5 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format       "
